form.label: Appliance Overview
form.description: This dashboard provides visibility into your Netscaler Appliances across the Enterprise. You can adjust the time range of this report by selecting your desired time using the picker below.

chart.title: Top Appliances by Traffic
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler | chart sum(total_bytes_recv) as "Bytes Received", sum(total_bytes_send) as "Bytes Sent" by host | rename host as "Appliance"

chart.title: Top Appliances with App Firewall Violations
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler log_type="APPFW" | rename host as "Appliance" | chart count(violation) by Appliance,violation

chart.title: Top Appliances with Admin Activity
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler UI | stats count by host | rename count as "Admin Activities", host as "Appliance"

chart.title: Bytes Received Per Appliance
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler | timechart sum(total_bytes_recv) AS "Total Bytes Received" by host

chart.title: Bytes Sent Per Appliance
chart.searchString: eventtype=netscaler | timechart sum(total_bytes_send) AS "Total Bytes Sent" by host
